calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Attorney Fees
Off Calendar May-18-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nicholas A. Rogers (925-838-2090) for Plaintiff/Moving party THOMAS SPARKS.
David Edward May (415-399-3900) for Defendant/opposing party Poppin & Shier.

The court announce the tentative ruling. Hearing is held. Plaintiff submits to the tentative ruling. Argued re: prevailing party gets attorney's fees, DF waived rights, 593(a). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT POPPIN & SHIER's Motion For Attorney Fees is taken under submission. Plaintiff to submit proposed order in conformity with the tentative ruling. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar May-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nicholas A. Rogers (925-838-2090) for Plaintiff/Moving party THOMAS SPARKS.
David Edward May (415-399-3900) for Defendant/opposing party Poppin & Shier.

The court announce the tentative ruling. Hearing is held. Plaintiff submits to the tentative ruling. Argued re: prevailing party gets attorney's fees, DF waived rights, 593(a). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF THOMAS SPARKS's Motion To Tax Costs is taken under submission. Plaintiff to submit proposed order in conformity with the tentative ruling. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
